training_status: sedentary (not going to gym during protocol)

benefits.description: Lost approximately 31 kg over 3 months, starting from ~124 kg down to 93.1 kg, without going to the gym
Tesamorelin added to stack to help preserve lean mass; estimated only ~5 kg lean mass lost with muscle mass starting at ~80 kg

side_effects.description: First time taking 6mg was tough, struggled to eat; split dosages to manage this

protocol_notes: Retatrutide dosing escalated over 3 months: Month 1 up to 3mg (1x weekly), Month 2 up to 6mg (split 3mg/3mg Monday/Thursday), Month 3 up to 12mg (split 6mg/6mg twice weekly). Tesamorelin 2mg Monday-Friday before sleep with no food 2 hours prior. Occasional MOTS-C. Low protein intake during protocol. Regular medical checks reported as normal. Planning 3-month break from Reta starting January. DEXA scan planned for January. OP self-reported ~5 kg lean mass loss based on body composition scale. Also mentioned SLU-PP-332, 5-Amino-1MQ, SS-31, and MOTS-C as an extended stack recommendation but unclear if personally used beyond MOTS-C.
